_comment: Source of truth for home.microprediction.org. Edit this, then run build.py. Run scan.py first to discover newer drafts / arxiv links across the sibling package repos. Link fields are optional; omit or leave empty to hide. 'draft' = most recent draft; set 'draft_new': true to flag it as newer than the arxiv/published version.

site.title: Peter Cotton
site.tagline: Quant researcher — portfolios, prediction, and the markets in between.
site.intro: An attempt to organize the scattered writings of a practitioner. Each entry links the canonical version (arXiv or journal) alongside the most recent working draft, which usually lives in the relevant package repository and moves faster than the published copy.

sections.title: Working papers
sections.blurb: In progress. The latest draft normally lives in the linked package repo.

sections.title: Papers & chapters
sections.blurb: Published in journals or edited volumes.

papers.title: Schur Complementary Portfolios
papers.abstract: A Schur-complement construction that repairs hierarchical risk parity and interpolates between it and minimum-variance.

papers.title: Schur Pseudo-Likelihood
papers.abstract: A pseudo-likelihood reading of the Schur construction.

papers.title: Two Sides of Schur Damping
papers.abstract: Two complementary views of the damping parameter in Schur-complementary portfolios.

papers.title: skaters: Model First, Conform Last — A Composition-Based Automatic Online Distributional Forecaster
papers.abstract: A practical benchmark for univariate distributional prediction: compose invertible transforms over a distributional leaf, fit by likelihood, conform the tail to a downstream score.

papers.title: HumpDay: Multi-Dimensional Thurstone Calibration for Context-Specific Optimizer Selection
papers.abstract: Thurstone calibration of black-box optimizers so the right one can be chosen per problem context.
